questions.question: What wood species is required?
questions.notes: PDF specifies 'pre-finished wooden handle block' but not species

questions.question: What tolerances are acceptable beyond those specified in PDF?
questions.notes: PDF provides nominal dimensions, need to confirm acceptable variance

questions.question: What finish is required on the wood?
questions.notes: PDF mentions 'pre-finished' - need to confirm if we apply finish or customer supplies pre-finished blanks

questions.question: Is updated STEP revision available?
questions.notes: PDF includes OpenSCAD code - confirm if STEP export is needed

questions.question: Is this prototype or production quantity?
Who supplies the rubber grip strips and Velcro?
questions.notes: PDF specifies VELCRO Brand HTH 830 and textured vulcanized rubber strips

questions.question: Is laser debossing included in CNC scope or separate operation?
What is the stock blank size being supplied?
questions.notes: Need to know starting stock dimensions for CAM planning
